response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills but lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows systems (only mentions C++ briefly in an embedded context over a decade ago). While there is domain experience in capital markets (RIDE Capital) and investment practices, the resume does not highlight fixed-income systems or SQL Server/Oracle expertise. The majority of recent work is in Node.js, TypeScript, and other modern stacks, which does not align with the core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) demonstrated at RIDE Capital
Diverse technical experience across multiple languages and platforms (C++, D, Java, TypeScript)
Proven ability to work in financial-services domain (RIDE Capital) and high-performance systems (Dunnhumby)
concerns: No recent or substantial hands-on C++ development on Windows platform (critical mandatory skill)
Limited to no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience (mandatory technical skill)
Domain expertise in capital markets is present but not explicitly tied to fixed-income systems or derivatives
